_note: Official Qwen3.5 benchmark scores extracted from the model cards at https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-{0.8B,2B,4B} (the 9B numbers also appear on the 4B card). Thinking-mode scores where available, non-thinking otherwise. These are scores for the POST-TRAINED / Instruct variants; our campaign tested the BASE models, so a direct accuracy comparison is not apples-to-apples — but the cross-scale shape of the curve is.

_mode_notes.0.8B: thinking mode where reported, else non-thinking
_mode_notes.2B: thinking mode where reported, else non-thinking
_mode_notes.4B: thinking mode (only mode reported on the 4B card)
_mode_notes.9B: thinking mode (only mode reported on the 4B card)
